cards.basicText: Move the fighter adjacent to an opposing fighter in the same zone. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: charge

cards.basicText: Choose an opposing fighter in your zone, if choosen fighter doesn't attack this fighter by the end of their next turn, they discard 1 card at random.
cards.title: Taunt

cards.afterText: Deal damage difference to all enemy fighters adjacent to you.
cards.basicText:
Requires & costs 1 rage point to play.
(This cost does not increase attack value)
cards.title: cleave

cards.duringText: You may boost the value of this card with rage points.
cards.title: defensive stance

cards.immediateText: Rage spent on this card is doubled.
cards.title: blood thirst

cards.afterText: If used offensively, you gain 1 action. If used defensively, opposing fighter loses 1 action.
cards.title: hamstring

cards.afterText: Gain rage points equal to the difference of damage done.
cards.basicText: Cairne does not lose rage points from this combat.
cards.title: fuel my hate

cards.afterText: If played by Cairne as an attack, gain 1 rage point
cards.title: Heroic Strike

cards.basicText:
Draw 2 cards.

If in the same zone as Cairne, Cairne gains 2 rage points.
cards.title: War Drums

cards.immediateText: Card value is 5 if adjacent to Baine.
cards.title: Bloodhoof Runespear

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards.
cards.title: Regroup

hero.name: Cairne Bloodhoof
hero.specialAbility:
After Cairne wins combat, gain 1 RAGE. Before attacks, Cairne may gain +1 ATK per RAGE spent.

Card cancelling cancels spent RAGE. If Carine loses combat or if Baine dies: lose all RAGE.

name: Cairne Bloodhoof
note: Chieftan of the Taurens, Cairne and his son are master warriors who channel and tempo their rage to overpower their foes. From the Warcraft universe.
